sub_modules.gd_gradient_calc: Pure combinational fixed-point derivative calculator. Computes f'(x) = ((2*a*x) >>> M) + b using widened signed intermediates.
sub_modules.gd_update_calc: Pure combinational gradient descent update datapath. Computes x_updated = x - ((alpha * gradient) >>> M) with widened signed multiplication and subtraction.
sub_modules.gd_iteration_done: Pure combinational iteration-limit checker. Indicates when the current CALC cycle is the final required iteration.
